steps.title: Identify the function of though
steps.content: The word “though” functions parenthetically here, inserted mid-sentence. It acknowledges the first claim—that axial tilt affects the Sun's position—while signaling a second factor (the eccentricity of Earth's orbit).

steps.title: Apply the parenthetical rule
steps.content: A parenthetical element requires commas on both sides: “position, though, as…” C omits the closing comma, while B and D both use semicolons, which separate independent clauses, not parenthetical insertions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
